name: Silent Wolf Calupo
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>沈黙狼</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>オメルタ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－カルーポ
desc: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: Equip the top card of your Deck to this card as a face-down Equip Spell that gives it 500 ATK. During the End Phase: Your opponent calls the original type (Monster, Spell, or Trap) of that Equip Card equipped by this card's effect. If they called it right, send this card to the GY. If they called it wrong, discard 1 random card from your opponent's hand, and if you do, return this card to the hand. You can only use this effect of "Silent Wolf Calupo" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: Equip the top card of your Deck to this card as a face-down Equip Spell that gives it 500 ATK. During the End Phase: Your opponent calls the original type (Monster, Spell, or Trap) of that Equip Card equipped by this card's effect. If they called it right, send this card to the GY. If they called it wrong, discard 1 random card from your opponent's hand, and if you do, return this card to the hand. You can only use this effect of "Silent Wolf Calupo" once per turn.
eff: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: Equip the top card of your Deck to this card as a face-down Equip Spell that gives it 500 ATK. During the End Phase: Your opponent calls the original type (Monster, Spell, or Trap) of that Equip Card equipped by this card's effect. If they called it right, send this card to the GY. If they called it wrong, discard 1 random card from your opponent's hand, and if you do, return this card to the hand. You can only use this effect of "Silent Wolf Calupo" once per turn.

sets.set: 25th Anniversary Tin: Dueling Heroes Mega Pack

action: Equips from the top of player's Deck to itself
Grants effect to Equip Spell Card
Sends itself from field to Graveyard
Returns itself from field to hand
mst: Treats Spell Cards as Equip Cards
Treats Trap Cards as Equip Cards
